name: Constructs
description: Machine soldiers built in the underground workshops of Stagnantia. Reliable, mass-produced, and expendable.

name: Beasts
description: Wild creatures dragged through mana portals from prehistoric dimensions. Unpredictable but ferocious.

name: Ancients
description: Warriors pulled from history's greatest battles. Each carries the weight of a lost civilisation.

name: Void Walkers
description: Beings that exist between dimensions. They do not belong to any time or place — only the arena.
